$comment: Opinionated mcp_toolset for Anthropic API users of token-savior. Drop into the `tools` array of a Messages API call (beta: mcp-client-2025-11-20). The non-deferred entries are the 17 hot tools that cover 90%+ of typical coding sessions; everything else is loaded on-demand via the Anthropic Tool Search tool. Rationale: AUDIT.md Phase 3.6 and Phase 4 B1. Anthropic recommends keeping 3-5 frequently used tools non-deferred; we keep 17 because code navigation uses more than that in a single flow.
